translations.text.fontManager.name: Name
translations.module.aimbot.description: Automatically faces selected entities around you.
translations.module.antiReducedDebugInfo.description: Prevents the server from forcing reduced debug info mode, keeping F3 coordinates and entity data visible.
translations.module.radar.description: A circular radar HUD that plots nearby players as dots, rotated by your facing.
translations.module.autoF5.description: Forces a chosen camera perspective and snaps back to first person when you attack.
translations.module.autoBuff.description: Automatically drinks beneficial potions from your hotbar when their effect is missing.
translations.module.autoArmor.description: Automatically equips the best armor in your inventory.
translations.module.autoBow.description: Automatically shoots an arrow whenever your bow is fully loaded.
translations.module.autoClicker.description: Constantly clicks when holding down a mouse button.
translations.module.autoDisable.description: Automatically disables selected module based on specified events.
translations.module.autoLeave.description: Automatically makes you leave the server whenever your health is low.
translations.module.autoRod.description: Auto use fishing rod to PVP.
translations.module.autoSoup.description: Makes you automatically eat soup whenever your health is low.
translations.module.autoWeapon.description: Automatically selects the best weapon in your hotbar.
translations.module.backtrack.description: Allows you to hit players by attacking their previous cached positions.
translations.module.projectileAimbot.description: Automatically aims at players when using a bow.
translations.module.fastBow.description: Turns your bow into a machine gun.
translations.module.ignite.description: Automatically sets targets around you on fire.
translations.module.superKnockback.description: Increases knockback dealt to other entities.
translations.module.teleportHit.description: Allows to hit entities from far away.
translations.module.tNTBlock.description: Automatically blocks with your sword when TNT around you explodes.
translations.module.tNTTimer.description: Display a timer indicating how long until nearby TNT explodes.
translations.module.velocity.description: Allows you to modify the amount of knockback you take.
translations.module.abortBreaking.description: Allows you to abort breaking without losing your break progress.
translations.module.ambience.description: Change your world time and weather client-side.
translations.module.bedGodMode.description: Allows you to walk around lying in a bed. (For 1.9)
translations.module.clip.description: Allows you to clip through blocks.
translations.module.airJump.description: Allows you to jump in the mid air
translations.module.airLadder.description: Allows you to climb up ladders/vines without touching them.
translations.module.antiBounce.description: Prevents you from bouncing on blocks.
translations.module.antiAFK.description: Prevents you from getting kicked for being AFK.
translations.module.antiBot.description: Prevents KillAura from attacking AntiCheat bots.
translations.module.antiFireball.description: Automatically punches fireballs away from you.
translations.module.antiVoid.description: Automatically setbacks you after falling a certain distance.
translations.module.atAllProvider.description: Automatically mentions everyone on the server when using '@a' in your message.
translations.module.autoAccount.description: Most feature-packed auto register/login & account manager.
translations.module.autoBreak.description: Automatically breaks the block you are looking at.
translations.module.autoFish.description: Automatically catches fish when using a rod.
translations.module.autoPlay.description: Automatically queues up for next match
translations.module.autoTool.description: Automatically selects the best tool in your inventory to mine a block.
translations.module.avoidHazards.description: Prevents you from walking into blocks that might be harmful to you.
translations.module.bedProtectionESP.description: Allows you to see where the blocks should be placed to protect a bed
translations.module.blockESP.description: Allows you to see a selected block through walls.
translations.module.blockOverlay.description: Allows you to change the design of the block overlay.
translations.module.blockWalk.description: Allows you to walk on non-fullblock blocks.
translations.module.bufferSpeed.description: Allows you to walk faster on slabs and stairs.
translations.module.cameraClip.description: Allows you to see through walls in third person view.
translations.module.chams.description: Allows you to see targets through blocks.
translations.module.chestStealer.description: Automatically steals all items from a chest.
translations.module.civBreak.description: Allows you to break blocks instantly.
translations.module.componentOnHover.description: Allows you to see onclick action and value of chat message components when hovered.
translations.module.consoleSpammer.description: Spams the console of the server with errors.
translations.module.derp.description: Makes it look like you were derping around.
translations.module.eSP.description: Allows you to see targets through walls.
translations.module.fakeLag.description: Lags you behind server side until first hit.
translations.module.fastBreak.description: Allows you to break blocks faster.
translations.module.fastClimb.description: Allows you to climb up ladders and vines faster.
translations.module.fastPlace.description: Allows you to place blocks faster.
translations.module.fastStairs.description: Allows you to climb up stairs faster.
translations.module.fastUse.description: Allows you to use items faster.
translations.module.flagCheck.description: Detects if you get flagged by an AntiCheat.
translations.module.fly.description: Allows you to fly in survival mode.
translations.module.forceUnicodeChat.description: Allows you to send unicode messages in chat.
translations.module.freeCam.description: Allows you to move out of your body.
translations.module.freeze.description: Holds you in place by suppressing outgoing movement packets and zeroing your velocity.
translations.module.fucker.description: Destroys selected blocks around you. (aka.  IDNuker)
translations.module.fullbright.description: Brightens up the world around you.
translations.module.gameDetector.description: Detects if you are in an ongoing game.
translations.module.ghost.description: Allows you to walk around and interact with your environment after dying.
translations.module.ghostHand.description: Allows you to interact with selected blocks through walls.
translations.module.iceSpeed.description: Allows you to walk faster on ice.
translations.module.inventoryMove.description: Allows you to walk while an inventory is opened.
translations.module.itemESP.description: Allows you to see items through walls.
translations.module.discordRPC.description: Shows your client status as Discord Rich Presence.
translations.module.iRC.description: Lets you chat with other client users over IRC.
translations.module.spotify.description: Displays and controls your Spotify playback in-game.
translations.module.tabGUI.description: A navigable tab-style module menu drawn on your HUD.
translations.module.autoBlock.description: Automatically blocks with your sword while attacking.
translations.module.fightBot.description: Automatically walks to and fights nearby enemies for you.
translations.module.hitSelect.description: Only attacks when a hit is likely to register, for more legit combat.
translations.module.infiniteAura.description: Attacks targets while ignoring normal distance limits.
translations.module.guiClicker.description: Automatically clicks slots inside open inventory GUIs.
translations.module.pingFix.description: Adjusts packet timing to reduce the impact of unstable ping.
translations.module.serverLag.description: Holds back outgoing packets to lag yourself back on the server.
translations.module.fastAccel.description: Accelerates you to full speed faster when you start moving.
translations.module.flight.description: Lets you fly through the air.
translations.module.instantStop.description: Instantly cancels your horizontal momentum when you stop moving.
translations.module.invMove.description: Lets you keep moving while an inventory or GUI is open.
translations.module.jesus.description: Lets you walk on top of water and other liquids.
translations.module.moveHelper.description: Assists your movement input for smoother, more consistent strafing.
translations.module.snapTap.description: Cancels opposite movement keys so the most recent press always wins.
translations.module.spider.description: Lets you climb walls like a spider.
translations.module.targetStrafe.description: Automatically strafes around your combat target.
translations.module.antiCheatDetector.description: Tries to detect which anticheat the current server is running.
translations.module.autoAddStaff.description: Automatically adds detected staff members to your watch list.
translations.module.fakePlayer.description: Spawns a fake player in the world for testing.
translations.module.gUICloser.description: Automatically closes specific GUIs as soon as they open.
translations.module.murderDetector.description: Highlights the murderer in Murder Mystery games.
translations.module.removeEffect.description: Removes selected potion effects from you client-side.
translations.module.unlimitedValues.description: Removes the safe minimum and maximum limits on module settings.
translations.module.autoQueue.description: Automatically rejoins server queues or minigames.
translations.module.bedPlates.description: Shows the defending layers around beds in Bed Wars.
translations.module.damageParticle.description: Shows floating damage numbers when entities take damage.
translations.module.dashTrail.description: Renders a trail behind you as you move.
translations.module.eSP2D.description: Draws 2D boxes around entities on your screen.
translations.module.glint.description: Customizes the enchantment glint effect on items.
translations.module.chineseHat.description: Renders a cosmetic conical hat on players.
translations.module.healthWarn.description: Warns you when your health drops too low.
translations.module.jumpCircle.description: Renders a circle effect beneath you when you jump.
translations.module.keepTabList.description: Keeps the player tab list visible at all times.
translations.module.lineGlyphs.description: Draws live line graphs of client stats on your HUD.
translations.module.noRender.description: Disables rendering of selected world and entity elements for clarity or FPS.
translations.module.silentHotbar.description: Switches your hotbar slot server-side without moving your visible selection.
translations.module.zoom.description: Zooms in your view while held.
translations.module.logoffSpot.description: Marks the last known position of players who log off or vanish near you.
translations.module.voidESP.description: Highlights players standing over the void and warns you when you are over it.
translations.module.strongholdFinder.description: Triangulates a stronghold from two thrown eyes of ender and renders its location.
translations.module.smartEat.description: Automatically eats the best food in your hotbar when hunger (or health) drops too low, then restores your previous slot.
translations.module.autoFarm.description: Automatically harvests fully grown crops (wheat, carrots, potatoes, nether wart) within a radius, with optional silent rotations, replanting and bone meal.
translations.module.autoPearl.description: Aim assist for ender pearls: while holding a pearl, silently solves the launch pitch so it lands at or near your target.
translations.module.itemTeleport.description: Allows you to pick up items far away.
translations.module.itemPhysics.description: Allows dropped items to have physics
translations.module.keepAlive.description: Tries to prevent you from dying.
translations.module.keepContainer.description: Allows you to open a formerly closed inventory container everywhere. (Press INSERT Key to open)
translations.module.keyPearl.description: Allows you to throw an ender pearl from your hotbar using a certain key.
translations.module.kick.description: Allows you to kick yourself from a server.
translations.module.ladderJump.description: Boosts you up when touching a ladder. (AAC)
translations.module.liquidChat.description: Allows you to chat with other LiquidBounce users.
translations.module.liquidWalk.description: Allows you to walk on water.
translations.module.liquids.description: Allows you to interact with liquids.
translations.module.midClick.description: Allows you to add a player as a friend by right clicking him.
translations.module.moreCarry.description: Allows you to store items in your crafting slots.
translations.module.multiActions.description: Allows you to use items while breaking blocks.
translations.module.nameTags.description: Changes the scale of the nametags so you can always read them.
translations.module.noBooks.description: Blocks server from opening books (forced ads, ...)
translations.module.noClip.description: Allows you to freely move through walls (A sandblock has to fall on your head).
translations.module.noFOV.description: Disables FOV changes caused by speed effect, etc.
translations.module.noFall.description: Prevents you from taking fall damage.
translations.module.noFluid.description: Ignore fluids like water and lava.
translations.module.noHurtCam.description: Disables hurt cam effect when getting hurt.
translations.module.noPitchLimit.description: Allows you to rotate your head indefinitely in every direction..
translations.module.noRotateSet.description: Prevents the server from rotating your head.
translations.module.noSlotSet.description: Prevents the server from changing your hotbar slot.
translations.module.noSlow.description: Cancels slowness effects caused by Soul Sand and using items.
translations.module.noSlowBreak.description: Automatically adjusts breaking speed when using modules that influence it.
translations.module.noSwing.description: Disabled swing effect when hitting an entity/mining a block.
translations.module.noWeb.description: Prevents you from getting slowed down in webs.
translations.module.packetDebugger.description: Allows you to debug server/client packets that being sent/receive
translations.module.parkour.description: Automatically jumps when reaching the edge of a block.
translations.module.perfectHorseJump.description: Automatically jumps when the jump bar of a horse is filled up completely.
translations.module.phase.description: Allows you to walk through blocks.
translations.module.pingSpoof.description: Spoofs your ping to a given value.
translations.module.plugins.description: Allows you to see which plugins the server is using.
translations.module.portalMenu.description: Allows you to open a menu while being in a portal.
translations.module.potionSaver.description: Freezes all potion effects while you are standing still.
translations.module.potionSpoof.description: Allows the player to have potion effects without actually having the potion.
translations.module.projectiles.description: Allows you to see where arrows will land.
translations.module.prophuntESP.description: Allows you to see disguised players in PropHunt.
translations.module.refill.description: Refills items such as blocks and food from inventory to hotbar.
translations.module.resourcePackSpoof.description: Prevents servers from forcing you to download their resource pack.
translations.module.reverseStep.description: Lets you step down ledges smoothly by pulling you downward while descending.
translations.module.rotations.description: Allows you to see server-sided head and body rotations.
translations.module.safeWalk.description: Prevents you from falling down as if you were sneaking.
translations.module.scaffold.description: Automatically places blocks beneath your feet.
translations.module.serverCrasher.description: Allows you to crash certain server.
translations.module.skinDerp.description: Makes your skin blink (Requires multi-layer skin).
translations.module.slimeJump.description: Allows you to to jump higher on slime blocks.
translations.module.spammer.description: Spams the chat with a given message.
translations.module.staffDetector.description: Detects and notify user of staff members on the server
translations.module.step.description: Allows you to step up blocks.
translations.module.storageESP.description: Allows you to see chests, etc. through walls.
translations.module.strafe.description: Allows you to freely move in mid air.
translations.module.tNTESP.description: Allows you to see ignited TNT blocks through walls.
translations.module.teams.description: Prevents Killaura from attacking team mates.
translations.module.timerRange.description: Allows you to manipulate the game speed in order to gain an advantage against your enemies.
translations.module.timer.description: Changes the speed of the entire game.
translations.module.tracers.description: Draws a line to targets around you.
translations.module.trueSight.description: Allows you to see invisible entities and barriers.
translations.module.vehicleOneHit.description: Allows you to break vehicles with a single hit.
translations.module.wallClimb.description: Allows you to climb up walls like a spider.
translations.module.xRay.description: Allows you to see ores through walls.
translations.module.disabler.description: Disables either a server or a specific anticheat detection.
translations.module.overrideRaycast.description: Overrides your rotation-based raycast with the server rotation based raycast.
translations.module.tickBase.description: Buffers ticks to get early hits of an enemy.
translations.module.combatVisuals.description: Add visual effects on enemies when killing them
translations.module.infiniteAura: Allows you to hit further than a certain number of blocks in a normal Killaura
translations.module.gapple.description: Uses golden or enchanted apples during PVP.
translations.module.chatControl.description: Controlling your chat, changing chat limits and stuff like that.
translations.module.discordRPCModule.description: Shows client activity in your discord profile.
translations.module.noAchievement.description: Removes the display of in-game achievements.
translations.module.snakeGame.description: The snake game for free. sniff sniff
translations.module.lightningdetect.description: Detects the lightning that struck and at what coordinates.
translations.module.autoRole.description: Adds a special (visual) role for you or a friend
translations.module.forwardTrack.description: Reveals the actual position of an entity.
translations.module.freeLook.description: Allows you to freely look around without changing your character's actual direction.
translations.module.silentHotbarModule.description: UNTRANSLATED: Controls in which scenarios the silently selected item should be rendered.
translations.module.pointerESP.description: Allows you to see pointed entity positions.
translations.module.cameraView.description: Allows you to modify your camera-Y position.
translations.module.fireFlies.description: Displays firefly visual effects around the player.
translations.module.anchor.description: Locks you to your current position by cancelling horizontal motion.
translations.module.noPush.description: Prevents you from being pushed by blocks and liquids.
translations.module.swordBlock.description: Keeps the sword blocking animation active while attacking.
translations.module.vehicleControl.description: Lets you freely steer and fly the vehicle you are riding.
translations.module.autoDodge.description: Nudges you out of the path of incoming arrows.
translations.module.macros.description: Runs a chat message or command when you press a chosen key.

module.surround.description: Surrounds you with blocks on all open sides for protection.
module.airPlace.description: Lets you place blocks in mid-air without a supporting block.
module.holeFiller.description: Automatically fills the open sides of the hole you are standing in.
module.blockTrap.description: Traps your target by placing blocks around them.
module.blockIn.description: Encloses your target by placing blocks on every open side.
module.replenish.description: Automatically refills the held item from a matching stack in your inventory.
module.autoShoot.description: Automatically charges and releases a bow at nearby targets.
module.blockBounce.description: Bounces you upward when standing on blocks.
module.portalMenu.description: Lets you open inventory/GUI screens while inside a nether portal.
module.noBlockInteract.description: Prevents interacting with blocks like chests, doors, buttons and levers.
module.liquidFiller.description: Fills nearby water and lava source blocks with solid blocks.
module.liquidPlace.description: Lets you place blocks against liquid surfaces as if they were solid.
module.targetLock.description: Locks onto your current combat target and keeps it selected.
module.autoBuild.description: Automatically builds a preset block pattern around you.
module.extinguish.description: Automatically puts out nearby fire blocks.
module.packetMine.description: Mines the targeted block using start/stop digging packets.
module.clickTp.description: Teleports to the block you are looking at on a keybind.
module.noInterpolation.description: Disables other entities position interpolation so they snap to server positions.
module.noEntityInteract.description: Prevents interacting with entities like villagers and item frames.
module.twerk.description: Rapidly toggles sneak for a twerking animation.
module.vomit.description: Spews particles from your mouth for a vomit effect.
module.nameCollector.description: Collects player names seen in the tab list and saves them to a file.
module.autoTrap.description: Traps your combat target by placing cobweb at their feet.
module.resetVL.description: Resets your anticheat violation level using a packet trick.
module.autoShop.description: Automatically buys configured items from a server shop GUI.
module.inventoryTracker.description: Tracks and displays recent inventory slot changes.
module.notebot.description: Plays note-block songs from files in the FDPCLIENT/songs folder.
module.itemTags.description: Renders info tags above dropped item entities.
module.protectionZones.description: Renders configured protection/region boxes in the world.
module.autoCrafter.description: Automatically crafts a configured item using the crafting grid.
module.smoothCamera.description: Enables the vanilla cinematic camera so look movement is eased instead of snapping.
module.itemScroller.description: Hold a mouse button and drag across slots to shift-move each stack you pass over.
